Describe the change in 2-5 lines.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check --manifest-path inject_helper/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path inject_helper/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Relevant launcher/helper/installer build completed

## Risks

Note any user-visible behavior changes, packaging impact, or follow-up work.
